productDisplayName: Fila Men's Drake Black Silver Shoe
description: A pleasure to ride on, the fila Drake shoe comes in a low profile-yet-stylish silhouette and a classic traction outsole that makes it a perfect buy.UpperSynthetic upper with contrast stripes and print designLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar with a fabric inner liningPadded footbed for impact protection and all-day comfortBranding on the tongue, lateral midfoot and heel for styleMidsolePU midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed lugs and terraced lugs on the back heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
